# General
For every coding task, follow the definitions stated in [agents.md](../agents.md) and [copilot-instructions.md](../copilot-instructions.md).
Ensure all contributions comply with the [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) guidelines, including legal and licensing requirements.

## Sandbox
When needed, create a temporary sandbox branch from `main` to experiment with ideas or validate approaches.
Once the experiment is complete, either discard the sandbox or integrate successful changes back into `main`.

## Playground
Playground areas can be used for prototyping or learning new technologies. Just make sure you add it to `.gitignore` so it doesn't get committed by accident.
Playground code should not be part of the main codebase and should not affect production systems.
